title: The Fox & The Crane
content:
You have heard how Sir Fox treated Crane:
    With soup in a plate. When again
    They dined, a long bottle
    Just suited Crane's throttle;
    And Sir Fox licked the outside in vain.

    There Are Games That Two Can Play At
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Fox & The Crane"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
